author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Plan: cross build now compiles past the libsqlite3-sys link failure but hits a new error — rust-embed's compile-time check for ../dashboard/dist/ fails because cross mounts only the crate dir (crosslink/) as /project, putting ../dashboard/ outside the mount. build.rs's placeholder-write fallback also fails (different filesystem perms inside the cross container). Fix: add crosslink/Cross.toml with a pre-build directive that creates /dashboard/dist/ with permissive perms inside the cross container's filesystem. cross's pre-build runs at image-build time and the result persists in the cross-image, so build.rs (which then runs at cargo-build time inside that image) can drop its placeholder index.html into the now-writable directory and rust-embed sees it at compile time. Single new file. Surgical to the cross-only path; no impact on native amd64 build.
